title: Innovative Crispy Australian Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: These crispy cookies are a kid-friendly Australian dish featuring chocolate chips and a nutty flavor, made dairy-free-friendly and cooked to perfection in a raclette-grill, utilizing steam for a unique texture.
instructions: Preheat the raclette-grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit, ensuring the steam function is enabled.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, and salt, then set aside.
In a large bowl, cream together the granulated sugar, brown sugar, and dairy-free butter until light and fluffy.
Beat in the vanilla extract until well combined.
Gradually mix in the flour mixture until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Stir in the chocolate chips and chopped macadamia nuts, if using.
Scoop tablespoon-sized balls of dough onto the preheated raclette-grill, leaving about 2 inches of space between each cookie.
Close the grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the edges are crispy and golden brown.
Remove the cookies from the grill and let cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes before serving.
